Class SpringDataJackson3Configuration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.web.config.SpringDataJackson3Configuration
All Implemented Interfaces:
SpringDataJackson3Modules
public class SpringDataJackson3Configuration extends Object implements SpringDataJackson3Modules
JavaConfig class to export Jackson 3-specific configuration.
Since:
4.0
Author:
Oliver Gierke, Mark Paluch

    static class 
    SpringDataJackson3Configuration.PageModule
    A Jackson module customizing the serialization of PageImpl instances depending on the SpringDataWebSettings handed into the instance.
